title: My Daughter Sold My Gifted Land For $410K And Fled. So I Foreclosed, Now She Gets Every Receipt.
description: I gave my daughter and son-in-law a tiny house eco-retreat on land I bought with my paid-off condo. They secretly sold it for $410K and vanished to Costa Rica. Now I run a luxury glamping site on that same land, garnish their accounts, and every booking sends an automated receipt straight to their inbox. #revenge #familybetrayal #glamping
thumb_text: EVERY GLAMPING BOOKING HITS HER INBOX
pinned_comment: If your own daughter sold the land you gifted her for $410K and fled to Costa Rica, would you have foreclosed and turned it into a glamping site that sends her a receipt every time someone books? Share how you would have handled it in the comments.

thumb_lines.text: I BUILT THEM A TINY HOUSE, THEY SOLD IT AND FLED TO COSTA RICA
